s: Discover and listen to thousands of free internet radio stations worldwide.
d:
Internet Radio is a free, open-source application that lets you discover and listen to thousands of radio stations from all around the world.

Features:

  • Discover: Browse an extensive list of radio stations powered by the community-driven RadioBrowser API.
  • Global Reach: Easily filter and search for stations by country or language.
  • Favorites: Save your preferred stations for quick and easy access later.
  • History: Return to your recently played stations and previous searches effortlessly.
  • Modern Interface: A clean, intuitive design ensuring a seamless listening experience.
  • Privacy Friendly: Open-source and built with your privacy in mind.
